headlines.headline: Louisville freshman Mikel Brown Jr. to declare for NBA draft
headlines.description: Louisville freshman guard Mikel Brown Jr. says he will enter the NBA draft after averaging 18.2 points, 4.7 assists and 3.3 rebounds in 21 games in his freshman year for the Cardinals.

headlines.headline: 2026 NBA buzz: Latest news, injuries, league intel, updates
headlines.description: Here's the latest news and reactions from our NBA insiders, including how the Bulls are thinking about their front office vacancies.

headlines.headline: LeBron walks back comments on Memphis, Milwaukee
headlines.description: LeBron James attempted to clear up recent remarks about Memphis and Milwaukee, but the Bucks made it clear they're not ready to move on just yet.

headlines.headline: NBA playoff watch: Timberwolves look to clinch
headlines.description: Minnesota can lock up a top-six spot Tuesday. Plus, updated playoff projections, draft lottery standings after Monday.

headlines.headline: Jokic's 35 points, 13 rebounds, 13 assists help the Nuggets get past the Trail Blazers 137-132 in OT
headlines.description: — Nikola Jokic had 35 points, 13 rebounds and 13 assists, and the Denver Nuggets rallied from a 16-point deficit in the fourth quarter to beat the Portland Trail Blazers 137-132 in overtime on Monday night.

headlines.headline: Are the Nuggets being overlooked in the West?
headlines.description: Alan Hahn and Iman Shumpert discuss why Nikola Jokic can power the Nuggets to another playoff run.

headlines.headline: Stephen A. Smith: Lamar Jackson has a lot on his shoulders this season
headlines.description: Stephen A. Smith takes stock of Lamar Jackson and the Ravens ahead of this season.

headlines.headline: Kyle Pitts signing franchise tag, reports to Falcons' workouts
headlines.description: Tight end Kyle Pitts Sr. is signing his franchise tender and reported for the beginning of the Falcons' offseason workout program, according to NFL Network.

headlines.headline: Why Schrager has 'most polarizing prospect' going to Chiefs in his mock draft
headlines.description: Peter Schrager breaks down why he has Arizona State receiver Jordyn Tyson going ninth overall to the Chiefs in his NFL mock draft.

headlines.headline: Kaepernick book comes decade after QB took knee during anthem
headlines.description: Colin Kaepernick said in a statement that his memoir out Sept. 15, "The Perilous Fight," will offer context for what led to his taking a knee.

headlines.headline: Masters menu leads sports world's signature food, drink staples
headlines.description: The Masters concession menu is notable for just how affordable it is, but the tournament isn't the only event associated with a signature food or beverage item.

headlines.headline: Bears icon Steve McMichael diagnosed with CTE year after death
headlines.description: Steve "Mongo" McMichael died in 2025 at age 67 after a five-year battle with ALS, and his wife Misty donated his brain to research.

headlines.headline: NHL playoff standings: Ranking the top matchups on Tuesday
headlines.description: It's a pivotal evening in the hockey world. Here are the games with the biggest stakes, plus full playoff projections after Monday.

headlines.headline: Ducks take losing streak into home matchup against the Predators
headlines.description: Nashville Predators (36-31-10, in the Central Division) vs. Anaheim Ducks (41-31-5, in the Pacific Division)

headlines.headline: Adrian Kempe scores in shootout as Kings beat Predators 3-2
headlines.description: — Adrian Kempe scored the only goal of the shootout in the second round, and the Los Angeles Kings tightened the Western Conference playoff race with a 3-2 win over the Nashville Predators on Monday night.
